meaning: v.鍚堝苟,骞跺叆,缁撳悎,鍚炴病,铻嶅悎
examples: His department will merge with mine.
The banks are set to merge next year.
A proposal to merge the two companies was voted through yesterday.
New video-processing chips, meanwhile, let agents merge images from infrared cameras with regular video.
Less than a year later, he agreed to merge the bank with Travelers Group.
